reviews.title: Ear piece hook
reviews.text: Comfort is relative to the design itself and not necessarily due to product. Durability is also related to how you handle placing the ear piece on. It’s very stiff and allows very little flexibility so subject to snap in pieces. As for the value it’s right on the money. Especially since I was unable to find a replacement locally (Romania). Despite the additional cost of shipping it was still better than buying a new Jabara headset. Also it arrived earlier than expected which was greatly appreciated.

reviews.title: Good Quality for the Price
reviews.text:
The sound quality on these headphones is surprisingly good for the price. You can hear sound details you might miss in a cheaper set. The playtime is impressive. The ear cuffs are comfortable even if you have sensitive ears. The overall design is sleek and modern. This is a great buy!

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided makes your decision a little easier.

reviews.title: Cute cat

Very easy to use and control volume or make calls or use siri voice. It has a shocking deep bass for better sound quality

reviews.title: Love the color and feel of the case
reviews.text: The case has a nice matte and rubbery feel to it. I was dropping my airpods constantly before I had this case (as I have butterfingers) and this case has helped reduce that drastically. I also like that I don't have to take the case off the lid before I open the airpod itself. (You gotta watch out for those as they can be very annoying to do every time you want to open your airpods). I posted a picture of my case and put my white airpod on top so you can have a better comparison of what the color looks like.

reviews.title: Silicone is is good. But key ring won't last
reviews.text: The silicone part was easy to put on. The adhesion holds well. But my bud case did open and a bud fell out. The problem is the key ring. The decorative pieces fell off within a month. Then the lobster claw hook fell off a few weeks later. Luckily, it happened while I was at home and not out where I would have lost my ear buds.

reviews.title: Cheap doesn't fit properly. Not a good design
reviews.text: Cheap doesn't fit properly. Not a good fit. Looks very cheap.

reviews.title: Does the job, looks cute
reviews.text: It definitely looks like the picture. The rubber is flimsy, and difficult to attach to the headphone case. It took me two tries to get it to fit the bottom appropriately, because the first time it slipped and I couldn't fit the charging cord through the back. But others might be better at this. The keychain is pretty. The clip to attach it is smaller than I anticipated and almost didn't fit my purse. It will protect the case from scratches, but that's hardly why I bought it- it's sparkly and pretty and does the job well enough.

reviews.title: OK Headphones
reviews.text: I think these headphones are more like 3.5 stars but I rounded up.  I have kind of a small head for an adult female, and still these headphones were too tight.  Usually I can wear headphones made for kids but not these.  These are definitely for smaller heads and small ears since the ear cups get painful after a while since they aren't big enough to fully cover my ears.  The sound is o.k., nothing to write home about, but for the price (as of this review these head phones cost $19.44) I think they are worth it.  Great for kids, not so good for adults, even if you are a pinhead.

reviews.title: High quality headphones
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 4th grade child to use at school. It is hard to find headphones with plug-ins and that aren't wireless. For my son, the ones with a plug are best to use his school issued ipad. These are sturdy and I'm hoping they last the entire school year.

reviews.title: Not really for large heads.
reviews.text: All the talk about "classroom" and "child's" in the Amazon listing really means "this is a small headset." It's not big enough for me. I have a large (7 3/4) head and this thing actually hurts my ears (presses on them too hard). If you need headphones for a child then this would work just fine. Not for me.

reviews.title: Good headphones for kids
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 6 yr old. They fit her great and don’t get so loud that they can damage her ears.

reviews.text: Great little case for a reasonable price but Jfc I can’t get this thing open with one hand which is a bit in convenient for me. Aside from that I definitely recommend it as long as that one issue I have wouldn’t be a problem for you! The color at first looked very good but once I installed it on my buds case it has more of a pinkish-rose gold tone! I probably won’t buy another and will look for a different case.

features: 【PREMIUM PU LEATHER & RETRO STYLE 】MRPLUM earphones case is made of top quality PU leather and hard EVA interlayer without any odor, durable, anti-fingerprint&light weight, exquisite workmanship and vintage outlooking can make you looks more stylish.

【COMPACT SIZE & MULTIPURPOSE】The earphone carrying case outer size is 2.8*2.2*0.8inch, it is easy to put it in your pocket, or bag, and the inner size is 2.6*2*0.8 inch, is perfectly compatible with Airpods 1/2/Pro, wire eaphones, data cables, keys, USB,SD card & change.

【ALL ROUND PROTECTION】Designed with premium zipper & material, the Ear Buds Case can well protect devices from scratching, dropping, featured with pressure-resistant and water-proof. keep the items in the case always clean and safe.

【MESH POCKET INSIDE】The Earbud Pouch has a mesh pocket inside, prevent your earbuds, or other items from moving, also avoid the wireed eaphone or the cord hang together, ensure make better use of space and hold all items in a neat condition.

【EASY TO CARRY & ANTI-LOST】The Earphones Case equipped with heavy duty metal keychain to attach it to your belt, backpack & bag easily, and carry it everywhere, it is also a practical design to avoid loosing your eaphones, keys and some important but mini objects.WARM TIPS: The package ONLY included a hard shell earbuds carrying case.

reviews.title: Nice little bud case
reviews.text: I could imagine a few other ways to utilize this little zippered case, designed for earbuds. But, it works very well for it's intended purpose. Even for some styles that have the 'wrap around' type support, as shown in my pics. It was a little snug, but they fit. The standard buds (either wired or wireless) fit much better. The case itself is nice 'pleather', good zipper and nicely appointed swivel snap to attach it to whatever you want to hang it on. My wife chose the natural leather color to go with one particular purse. She hangs it on the outside of the purse, like a 'bling' effect. Looks great. Good purchase. Five stars.

reviews.title: Just what the doctor ordered
reviews.text: I was looking for a case that would hold my slightly over-sized earbuds without it being too large or too bulky. These fit perfectly in my briefcase and there is plenty of room for my over-sized buds. It's a really  attractive case  for the money. I'm not sure if that is real leather, but who cares as long as they protect  what's inside. The added hook comes in handy since I can attach it to a loop in my briefcase so that it doesn't sink to the bottom and I have to dig for it.

reviews.title: Well made
reviews.text: Very well made.  Anticipate it lasting a very long time.  plenty of room. Use it to hold my headset for cellphone.  Very pleased with product.

reviews.title: Perfect size
reviews.text: I got this to hold my hearing aids, and they fit perfectly with room for extra batteries.

title: AGVEE 32Bit 384Khz USB-C to 3.5mm Headphone Adapter, Type-C Aux Jack Earbuds Splitter, USBC Audio Earphones Dongle, PD 30W Charging Converter for Samsung S21 S20, Note 20 10, Pixel 2 3 4 5, Black
description:
⭕[SUPPORT PD & QC FAST CHARGING]
This is an upgraded version that supports PD and QC charging protocols. Maximum power is 9V*2A=18W.

Built-in Realtek advanced digital audio processing chip, 32-bit stereo audio DAC, 384K sampling rate, active noise reduction, gives you Hi-res sound performance. Conversion distortion is less than 1%. You can use a not particularly bad earbuds for a simple comparison test.

High Resolution Audio by DAC is pure without any unpleasant bottom noise. With a higher dynamic range and 120dB Signal Noise Ratio, it can ensure good resolution in both low-frequency and high-frequency, and accurately reproduce all details in music. Good high frequency extension performance. The medium frequency is clean and full, with flexibility and strength, the voice is friendly and natural. The low frequency is thick and heavy, giving you a powerful pleasure.

This 2-in-1 USB C to 3.5mm Aux Headphone Charging Adapter is specailly designed for USB-C phones without 3.5mm audio port, you can listen to music with 3.5mm earbuds and fast charging at the same time. Support remote control and low noise calls. It's a little tight for iPad Pro.

features: 💓[HUMANIZED UPGRADE] You can connect the phone, headphones and charge cable together in any order, You do not have to connect in order.

🚀[HIGH FIDELITY OUTPUT]High-Excursion drivers that allow for greater dynamic range, improved bass, and lower distortion. Signal Noise Ratio (SNR) 120dB. Total Harmonic Distortion (THD) 90dB. Professional class G headphone output. Active noise cancellation (ANC) feature. Support 44.1k-384k/32bit full frequency sampling. So many excellent parameters ensure an immersive & vivid gaming & music experience.

🌱[HI-RES SOUND] The Hi-Res certified DAC converter provides high-resolution audio, which can express the ultimate quality of music and the reproduction of the original sound, and get the real feeling of the original singer or performer in the live performance. Very suitable for HIFI earbuds. Because the chip is ultra-low power, compared to those with high power consumption, it can effectively extend the phone battery life without worrying about battery overload.

🚩[KEY UPDATES & FAST CHARGING] [1]-Support PD & QC Fast Charing. [2]-Seamless USB C male connector, ensure better anti-interference transmission. [3]-The Latest High Speed and High Resolution Decoding Chip. Support Maximum Power 18W(9V*2A), compatible with PD & QC charging protocol. Cannot be used for data transfer. Support remote control and low noise calls. (Volume +/- of original Apple 3.5mm earpods is not supported.)

⭕[COMPATIBLE WITH] The following device are recommended: For iPad Pro (2020, 2018) 12.9 & 11 & iPad Air 2020; For Samsung Galaxy S21 S20(Ultra, FE 5G), Note 20 10(Ultra), Z Filp, Z Fold 2, A80, Tab S5e/S6; For Google Pixel 2/2XL/3/3XL/3A/3A XL/4/4XL/5/6/6 Pro, Essential Phone. reviews.title: Nice hard case to protect AirPods
reviews.text: This is a nice hard case to use to protect your AirPods if you like to go hiking or running.  This gives you added protection in case it fall or drops. There is a push latch that you use to open the case and a key ring to attach to your backpack.  The latch locks the case so it doesn't come open by mistake and the material of the case is sturdy and is easy to hold.  The pattern on the case is attractive and makes sure you don't see fingerprints. This is a must have for attractiveness and safety .
